title: QDC Machines
description:
Machines used for automation, to plant, harvest and disassemble stuff.
Particle Accelerator Building is used to generate nature particles
body:
**NOTE: This mod is no longer maintained on this project, it has been added as part of the new QDC Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft version.**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.0)

This mod require the main mod Qdc Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft to work.

Machines used for automation, to plant, harvest and disassemble stuff.

Particle Accelerator Building is used to generate nature particles

Most machines use nature particles as fuel.

Some machines require a chest to store gathered items.

Options in the machines are unlocked by discovering the item using a Disassembler Block or a Portable Disassembler.

Some machines require a redstone signal to work.

Note: All the machines can be hooked up to an Item Transport Network from the QDC Transport mod.
